title: Roast Beef with Date Glaze
description: A sweet and savory roast beef dish featuring a date glaze. Perfect for a special occasion dinner.
instructions: Season the roast beef with salt and pepper.
In a small saucepan, combine chopped dates, Canadian roast, and red wine (if using).
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Rub the roast beef with the date glaze, making sure to coat all surfaces.
Place the roast beef in a roasting pan and dot the top with unsalted butter.
Roast the beef in the preheated oven for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve with additional date glaze, if desired.
